title: Eternal Fire│永恆之火
description: Creates fire around Blaze, buffs when on fire, and more. │讓烈焰使者周圍產生火焰、在火中獲得增益等等。
body:
# Function│功能
- The Blaze, when on fire, gains 1 armor per second (Max is 10), if it is not on fire, the armor is removed.│烈焰使者著火時，每秒增加1護甲（上限為10）‎，未著火時清除護甲值。
  - Entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {add_armor:0}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {add_armor:1}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {add_armor:0}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {add_armor:1}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- The Blaze, when on fire, regenerates 1 health per 2 seconds.│烈焰使者著火時，每2秒回復1生命。
  - Entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {regeneration:0}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {regeneration:1}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {regeneration:0}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {regeneration:1}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- When a blaze touches fire or lava, it will catch fire (same mechanics as in vanilla).│烈焰人碰到火或是熔岩時，它會著火（與原版機制相同）‎。
- The Blaze will continuously generate fire at its position and surroundings.│烈焰使者會持續在自己的位置及四周產生火焰。
  - Entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {make_fire:0}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {make_fire:1}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {make_fire:0}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {make_fire:1}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- Blaze Rods in item form will not be destroyed by fire.(This feature requires [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) to be installed in order to function.)│物品型態的烈焰桿不會被燒毀。（這個功能需要安裝 [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) 才能運作）
- The small fireballs fired by the Blaze will create small fire explosions when they hit blocks or entities, damaging nearby mobs.│烈焰使者發射的火焰彈擊中方塊或實體時會產生小型火爆，對周圍生物產生爆炸傷害。
  - Entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {flame_explosion:0}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {flame_explosion:1}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {flame_explosion:0}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {flame_explosion:1}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- Blazes will turn water into pebbles when touching it.│烈焰使者碰到水時會使水變成鵝卵石。
  - Entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {turn_water_into_cobblestone:0}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {turn_water_into_cobblestone:1}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {turn_water_into_cobblestone:0}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage eternal_fire:config {turn_water_into_cobblestone:1}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- Blazes will drop at least one Blaze Rod.│烈焰人至少會掉落一個烈焰棒。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
